name: io.github.danielpolok/my-fund-mcp
title: myFund Portfolio
description: Read-only MCP server for analyzing live myFund.pl investment portfolio data, holdings, allocation, and benchmark performance.

environmentVariables.name: MYFUND_PORTFEL
environmentVariables.description: myFund.pl portfolio selector passed as the API portfel parameter.

environmentVariables.name: MYFUND_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: myFund API base URL. Defaults to https://myfund.pl/API/v1.

environmentVariables.name: MY_FUND_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Optional local transport override: stdio, streamable-http, or sse. Defaults to stdio.

environmentVariables.name: MY_FUND_MCP_MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE
environmentVariables.description: Optional per-process myFund API call rate limit. Defaults to 30.
